name: clp
description: Compress, search, and decompress Claude Code and Codex session log archives with CLP.

interface.shortDescription: Compress and search Claude Code and Codex session logs with CLP.
interface.longDescription: Use CLP to compress selected Claude Code or Codex JSONL session logs, search regular CLP archive directories with KQL, and decompress local archive directories.
defaultPrompt: Search my coding-agent session logs with CLP.
Compress my latest Codex or Claude session log.
